items.title: During the West finals, Julian recalled his mindset after the Spurs signed him off waivers in 2023.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
During the West finals, Julian recalled his mindset after the Spurs signed him off waivers in 2023.

"I put my head down, said, 'Make it work. Whatever they give you, make it  work. Whatever they need you to do, make it work, and just find that spot on the team.' "

items.title: Can confirm the Jazz are bringing back Jusuf Nurkić. The 2-year, $22 million deal is below what many believed Nurk would garner on the FA market, but the situation is helped by how much Nurk truly enjoyed last season, playing for Will Hardy and how valued he felt by the Jazz

items.title: Prophetic words regarding Julian Champagnie from Wemby back in January after a game in Boston:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Prophetic words regarding Julian Champagnie from Wemby back in January after a game in Boston:

“The front office, the coaching staff, everybody believes in him and he’s just capitalizing on that. It’s like we can’t  do without him now. He’s a big part of this. He’s indispensable.”

items.title: Free agent sharpshooter Kevin Huerter intends to sign a three-year, $27 million deal to return to the Detroit Pistons, sources tell ESPN. The Pistons worked through the deal with Mark Bartelstein and Andy Shiffman of @PrioritySports on Monday.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Free agent sharpshooter Kevin Huerter intends to sign a three-year, $27 million deal to return to the Detroit Pistons, sources tell ESPN. The Pistons worked through the deal with Mark Bartelstein and Andy Shiffman of @PrioritySports on Monday.
